title: Torrezx-Sulfur slime tools
description: Enjoy your new set of tools and weapons inspired by the Sulfur slime
body:
Torrezx-Sulfur slime tools

ESPAÑOL:

Nuevas herramientas pegajosas y muy divertidas para tu mundo de minecraft
combina con el nuevo mob de mc con este set tematico.

ENGLISH:

New sticky and fun tools for your Minecraft world! Match the new 
MC mob with this themed set.

Renombra el item en el yunque-Rename the item on the anvil (26.2x-1.21.5)
Lista-List
Sulfur slime sword-pickaxe-axe-shovel-hoe-bow
-in copper-iron-diamond-netherite tools: Sulfur slime pickaxe-Sulfur slime bow

Reemplaza/Replace (1.21.4x-1.20.2)
-Diamond tools
-Bow

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
